name: perform-catalog-stage-orientation
note: CW-1 regression guard (operator UAT fix-up, 3 defects): using REAL catalog songs (not the synthetic overflow-forcing seed in perform-long-line-wrap.json) with genuinely wide chord vocabularies - 'No Woman No Cry' (open C/G/Am/F) and 'Calluses' (Dm/Bb/F/C/Eb, several 5-letter+ chord-with-quality tokens) - confirms the padding-aware wrap budget + rotate re-fit didn't regress the COMMON case: normal-length catalog lines that may not even need to wrap still render with zero overflow and correct chord-over-lyric column alignment in both portrait and landscape. Bar TIGHTENED for the wrap-first sizing model (operator-approved 2026-07-24): every song/orientation leg now also asserts the 0.8x/~13px legibility floor - the old shrink-to-fit model failed this on tall songs (Calluses landed ~0.64x in portrait). EXTENDED for sizing model v3 (operator-refined 2026-07-24): a 'Three Little Birds' block proves the auto-fit curve on a real catalog song - its ~59-char widest row FLOORS the scale (0.8) and WRAPS at 412px portrait, then a desktop-wide 1024px resize re-fits ABOVE the floor where NOTHING wraps (4 sheet lines = 4 rows) and the scale strictly GREW - fit-by-font first, wrap only at the floor.

steps.label: No Woman No Cry: stage open
No Woman No Cry (portrait): no .lyrLine overflows the stage viewport
No Woman No Cry (portrait): LEGIBILITY FLOOR (wrap-first model) - --pscale >= 0.8, every .lyrLine >= 13px effective
No Woman No Cry (portrait): chord stays column-synced over its lyric
steps.js: (function(){var pSheet=document.getElementById('pSheet');var lines=pSheet.querySelectorAll('.lyrLine');if(!lines.length)return false;var checked=0;for(var i=0;i<lines.length;i++){var crd=lines[i].querySelector('.crd');if(!crd)continue;var crdNode=crd.firstChild;if(!crdNode||crdNode.nodeType!==3)continue;var lyricNode=null;for(var n=crd.nextSibling;n;n=n.nextSibling){if(n.nodeType===3){lyricNode=n;break;}}if(!lyricNode)continue;var lyricFull=lyricNode.textContent;var lyricStart=lyricFull.indexOf('\n')+1;var crdLen=crdNode.textContent.length;var lyricLen=lyricFull.length-lyricStart;var sampleLen=Math.min(crdLen,lyricLen);if(sampleLen<1)continue;var step=Math.max(1,Math.floor(sampleLen/6));for(var c=0;c<sampleLen;c+=step){var r1=document.createRange();r1.setStart(crdNode,c);r1.setEnd(crdNode,c+1);var r2=document.createRange();r2.setStart(lyricNode,lyricStart+c);r2.setEnd(lyricNode,lyricStart+c+1);var b1=r1.getBoundingClientRect(),b2=r2.getBoundingClientRect();if(Math.abs(b1.left-b2.left)>2)return false;checked++;}}return checked>0;})()

steps.label: No Woman No Cry (landscape): no .lyrLine overflows
No Woman No Cry (landscape): LEGIBILITY FLOOR (wrap-first model) - --pscale >= 0.8, every .lyrLine >= 13px effective
No Woman No Cry (landscape): no .lyrLine overlaps the .pNav button column
steps.js: (function(){var pSheet=document.getElementById('pSheet');var nav=document.querySelector('.pNav');if(!pSheet||!nav)return false;var navBox=nav.getBoundingClientRect();var lines=pSheet.querySelectorAll('.lyrLine');if(!lines.length)return false;for(var i=0;i<lines.length;i++){var b=lines[i].getBoundingClientRect();var overlaps=!(b.right<=navBox.left||b.left>=navBox.right||b.bottom<=navBox.top||b.top>=navBox.bottom);if(overlaps)return false;}return true;})()

steps.label: Calluses (portrait): LEGIBILITY FLOOR (wrap-first model) - --pscale >= 0.8, every .lyrLine >= 13px effective
Calluses (portrait): chord stays column-synced over its lyric (Dm/Bb/F/C/Eb, wider tokens than the plain C/G/Am/F set)
steps.js: (function(){var pSheet=document.getElementById('pSheet');var lines=pSheet.querySelectorAll('.lyrLine');if(!lines.length)return false;var checked=0;for(var i=0;i<lines.length;i++){var crd=lines[i].querySelector('.crd');if(!crd)continue;var crdNode=crd.firstChild;if(!crdNode||crdNode.nodeType!==3)continue;var lyricNode=null;for(var n=crd.nextSibling;n;n=n.nextSibling){if(n.nodeType===3){lyricNode=n;break;}}if(!lyricNode)continue;var lyricFull=lyricNode.textContent;var lyricStart=lyricFull.indexOf('\n')+1;var crdLen=crdNode.textContent.length;var lyricLen=lyricFull.length-lyricStart;var sampleLen=Math.min(crdLen,lyricLen);if(sampleLen<1)continue;var step=Math.max(1,Math.floor(sampleLen/6));for(var c=0;c<sampleLen;c+=step){var r1=document.createRange();r1.setStart(crdNode,c);r1.setEnd(crdNode,c+1);var r2=document.createRange();r2.setStart(lyricNode,lyricStart+c);r2.setEnd(lyricNode,lyricStart+c+1);var b1=r1.getBoundingClientRect(),b2=r2.getBoundingClientRect();if(Math.abs(b1.left-b2.left)>2)return false;checked++;}}return checked>0;})()

steps.label: Calluses (landscape): LEGIBILITY FLOOR (wrap-first model) - --pscale >= 0.8, every .lyrLine >= 13px effective
Calluses (landscape): no .lyrLine overlaps the .pNav button column
steps.js: (function(){var pSheet=document.getElementById('pSheet');var nav=document.querySelector('.pNav');if(!pSheet||!nav)return false;var navBox=nav.getBoundingClientRect();var lines=pSheet.querySelectorAll('.lyrLine');if(!lines.length)return false;for(var i=0;i<lines.length;i++){var b=lines[i].getBoundingClientRect();var overlaps=!(b.right<=navBox.left||b.left>=navBox.right||b.bottom<=navBox.top||b.top>=navBox.bottom);if(overlaps)return false;}return true;})()

steps.label: Three Little Birds (412 portrait, v3 auto-fit): the ~59-char widest row FLOORS the scale at 0.8 and WRAPS (more rows than the 4 sheet lines); no row overflows
steps.js: (function(){var p=document.querySelector('.perform');if(!p||!p.classList.contains('on'))return false;var pSheet=document.getElementById('pSheet');var sc=parseFloat(getComputedStyle(pSheet).getPropertyValue('--pscale'));if(Math.abs(sc-0.8)>=0.011)return false;var lines=pSheet.querySelectorAll('.lyrLine');if(!(lines.length>4))return false;var cs=getComputedStyle(pSheet);var avail=pSheet.clientWidth-(parseFloat(cs.paddingLeft)||0)-(parseFloat(cs.paddingRight)||0);for(var i=0;i<lines.length;i++){if(lines[i].scrollWidth>avail+1)return false;}window.__tlbPortrait=sc;return true;})()

steps.label: Three Little Birds (1024 desktop-wide resize): auto-fit re-fit ABOVE the floor - scale strictly GREW, NOTHING wraps any more (4 sheet lines = 4 rows), no overflow (fit-by-font first, wrap only at the floor)
Three Little Birds (1024): chord stays column-synced over its lyric at the expanded size
steps.js: (function(){var pSheet=document.getElementById('pSheet');var lines=pSheet.querySelectorAll('.lyrLine');if(!lines.length)return false;var checked=0;for(var i=0;i<lines.length;i++){var crd=lines[i].querySelector('.crd');if(!crd)continue;var crdNode=crd.firstChild;if(!crdNode||crdNode.nodeType!==3)continue;var lyricNode=null;for(var n=crd.nextSibling;n;n=n.nextSibling){if(n.nodeType===3){lyricNode=n;break;}}if(!lyricNode)continue;var lyricFull=lyricNode.textContent;var lyricStart=lyricFull.indexOf('\n')+1;var crdLen=crdNode.textContent.length;var lyricLen=lyricFull.length-lyricStart;var sampleLen=Math.min(crdLen,lyricLen);if(sampleLen<1)continue;var step=Math.max(1,Math.floor(sampleLen/6));for(var c=0;c<sampleLen;c+=step){var r1=document.createRange();r1.setStart(crdNode,c);r1.setEnd(crdNode,c+1);var r2=document.createRange();r2.setStart(lyricNode,lyricStart+c);r2.setEnd(lyricNode,lyricStart+c+1);var b1=r1.getBoundingClientRect(),b2=r2.getBoundingClientRect();if(Math.abs(b1.left-b2.left)>2)return false;checked++;}}return checked>0;})()
